panels.description: Indica se il monitoraggio notturno del paziente è attivo.

targets.query:
import "array"
state = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_session_state" and r._field == "active" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _field: "monitoraggio", _value: r._value}))
baseline = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _field: "monitoraggio", _value: 0}])
union(tables: [baseline, state]) |> group(columns: []) |> max(column: "_value")

panels.title: Monitoraggio

panels.description: Ultima posizione notturna stabilizzata nella sessione corrente.

targets.query:
import "array"
state = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_session_state" and r._field == "active" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, session_id: if r._value == 1 then r.session_id else "__inactive__"}))
inactive = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _value: 0, session_id: "__inactive__"}])
activeSession = union(tables: [inactive, state]) |> group(columns: []) |> max(column: "_value") |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "position_code" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.session_id == activeSession.session_id) |> group(columns: []) |> last()

panels.title: Posizione corrente

panels.description: Vale 1 quando viene rilevata la posizione supina, 0 in ogni altra posizione.

targets.query:
import "array"
state = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_session_state" and r._field == "active" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, session_id: if r._value == 1 then r.session_id else "__inactive__"}))
inactive = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _value: 0, session_id: "__inactive__"}])
activeSession = union(tables: [inactive, state]) |> group(columns: []) |> max(column: "_value") |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "position_code" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.session_id == activeSession.session_id) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r.position == "supine" then 1.0 else 0.0, _field: "Supino"})) |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Supino

panels.description: Vale 1 quando viene rilevata la posizione prona, 0 in ogni altra posizione.

import "array"
state = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_session_state" and r._field == "active" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, session_id: if r._value == 1 then r.session_id else "__inactive__"}))
inactive = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _value: 0, session_id: "__inactive__"}])
activeSession = union(tables: [inactive, state]) |> group(columns: []) |> max(column: "_value") |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "position_code" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.session_id == activeSession.session_id) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r.position == "prone" then 1.0 else 0.0, _field: "Prono"})) |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Prono

panels.description: Vale 1 quando viene rilevato il decubito destro, 0 in ogni altra posizione.

targets.query:
import "array"
state = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_session_state" and r._field == "active" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, session_id: if r._value == 1 then r.session_id else "__inactive__"}))
inactive = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _value: 0, session_id: "__inactive__"}])
activeSession = union(tables: [inactive, state]) |> group(columns: []) |> max(column: "_value") |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "position_code" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.session_id == activeSession.session_id) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r.position == "right_side" then 1.0 else 0.0, _field: "Decubito destro"})) |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Decubito destro

panels.description: Vale 1 quando viene rilevato il decubito sinistro, 0 in ogni altra posizione.

targets.query:
import "array"
state = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_session_state" and r._field == "active" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, session_id: if r._value == 1 then r.session_id else "__inactive__"}))
inactive = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _value: 0, session_id: "__inactive__"}])
activeSession = union(tables: [inactive, state]) |> group(columns: []) |> max(column: "_value") |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "position_code" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.session_id == activeSession.session_id) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r.position == "left_side" then 1.0 else 0.0, _field: "Decubito sinistro"})) |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Decubito sinistro

panels.description: Tempo totale trascorso dall'attivazione della sessione notturna corrente.

targets.query:
import "array"
state = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -7d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_session_state" and r._field == "active" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 1) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _field: "durata_sessione", _value: float(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: r._time)) / 1000000000.0}))
baseline = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _field: "durata_sessione", _value: 0.0}])
union(tables: [baseline, state]) |> group(columns: []) |> max(column: "_value")

panels.title: Tempo totale sessione corrente

panels.description: Percentuale live del tempo trascorso nelle quattro posizioni durante la sessione notturna attiva.

targets.query:
import "array"
state = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_session_state" and r._field == "active" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, session_id: if r._value == 1 then r.session_id else "__inactive__"}))
inactive = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _value: 0, session_id: "__inactive__"}])
activeSession = union(tables: [inactive, state]) |> group(columns: []) |> max(column: "_value") |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
classified = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "position_code" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.session_id == activeSession.session_id) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, position: r.position}))
baseline = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), position: "baseline"}])
union(tables: [baseline, classified]) |> group(columns: []) |> reduce(identity: {selected: 0.0, total: 0.0}, fn: (r, accumulator) => ({selected: accumulator.selected + (if r.position == "supine" then 1.0 else 0.0), total: accumulator.total + (if r.position == "baseline" then 0.0 else 1.0)})) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _field: "Supino", _value: if r.total > 0.0 then r.selected / r.total * 100.0 else 0.0}))

import "array"
state = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_session_state" and r._field == "active" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, session_id: if r._value == 1 then r.session_id else "__inactive__"}))
inactive = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _value: 0, session_id: "__inactive__"}])
activeSession = union(tables: [inactive, state]) |> group(columns: []) |> max(column: "_value") |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
classified = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "position_code" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.session_id == activeSession.session_id) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, position: r.position}))
baseline = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), position: "baseline"}])
union(tables: [baseline, classified]) |> group(columns: []) |> reduce(identity: {selected: 0.0, total: 0.0}, fn: (r, accumulator) => ({selected: accumulator.selected + (if r.position == "prone" then 1.0 else 0.0), total: accumulator.total + (if r.position == "baseline" then 0.0 else 1.0)})) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _field: "Prono", _value: if r.total > 0.0 then r.selected / r.total * 100.0 else 0.0}))

import "array"
state = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_session_state" and r._field == "active" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, session_id: if r._value == 1 then r.session_id else "__inactive__"}))
inactive = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _value: 0, session_id: "__inactive__"}])
activeSession = union(tables: [inactive, state]) |> group(columns: []) |> max(column: "_value") |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

baseline = array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), position: "baseline"}])
union(tables: [baseline, classified]) |> group(columns: []) |> reduce(identity: {selected: 0.0, total: 0.0}, fn: (r, accumulator) => ({selected: accumulator.selected + (if r.position == "right_side" then 1.0 else 0.0), total: accumulator.total + (if r.position == "baseline" then 0.0 else 1.0)})) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _field: "Decubito destro", _value: if r.total > 0.0 then r.selected / r.total * 100.0 else 0.0}))

import "array"
state = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_session_state" and r._field == "active" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, session_id: if r._value == 1 then r.session_id else "__inactive__"}))

panels.title: Distribuzione percentuale della sessione live

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "patient_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position", start: 0)
list.label: Paziente monitorato
list.name: patient_id
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "patient_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position", start: 0)
